name: Cerenade
message: Cerenade Technology is a leader in providing cloud-based solutions for immigration law firms, offering products such as eIMMIGRATION, eCMS, and eForms Solutions. Their software aims to automate workflows, manage cases and clients, and ensure compliance for legal and government organizations.This is a very special case. We obtained almost 100gb of their clients scanned documents (passports and visas). Thousands of adults and kids are going to suffer because of this leak. We got documents of people from India, USA, Mexico, Middle East countries, Japan and other countries around the globe. It appears that Cerenade's software automates personal fraud schemes.
